title: Seasonal influenza - vaccination recommendations
summary: WHO recommends annual flu vaccination for high-risk groups. Northern hemisphere 2024-25 vaccine now available.

title: Dengue - global increase in cases
summary: Dengue cases rising in tropical regions. Mosquito control and early detection remain key prevention measures.

title: Respiratory infections - hygiene guidance
summary: Hand hygiene, mask use in crowded settings, and ventilation reduce spread of respiratory illnesses.
